title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Boris Cherny's actual usage patterns of Claude Code Skills, highlighting three key strategies: agents, hooks, and loops. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's automation system by examining interviews, threads, and config files to identify which Claude Code features are most powerful but underutilized.
